title: Senior Teacher - TechSaksham - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - TechSaksham - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Join the TechSaksham family as a Senior Teacher in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TechSaksham:
TechSaksham is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
